description_long: This is a large, round-bodied vase with a smooth, matte white surface and a wide, slightly flared neck. The vase features two prominent rectangular handles on opposite sides, which are integrated into the body and provide a geometric accent to the otherwise spherical form. The opening at the top is circular and proportionally smaller than the body, suitable for holding large floral arrangements or decorative branches. The surface is unadorned, lacking any visible patterns, motifs, or color variations, giving it a minimalist and modern appearance. The handles are solid and functional, suggesting the vase can be easily lifted or repositioned. Its substantial size and clean design make it suitable as a statement piece in urban public spaces or contemporary gardens.
description: A large, spherical white vase with a wide neck and two rectangular side handles, featuring a smooth, minimalist surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the round body and a single prominent rectangular handle centered on the surface.
description_view_1: Side view revealing both rectangular handles symmetrically placed on either side of the vase.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with the opposite rectangular handle visible.
description_view_3: Side view similar to view 1, displaying both handles and the vase's full width.
